title: The Feast
subtitle: The Cornucopia is replenished with food, supplies, weapons, and memoirs from the tributes' families.

events.text: {name} gathers as much food into a bag as they can before fleeing.
{name} sobs while gripping a photo of their family.
{name} stuffs a bundle of dry clothing into a backpack before sprinting away.
{name} takes a staff leaning against the Cornucopia.
{name} decides not to go to The Feast.
{name} grabs a sponsor gift addressed to them and opens it with trembling hands.
{name} snatches a medical kit and retreats before anyone can react.
{name} grabs a weapon upgrade and gets out fast.
{name} and {name2} get into a fight over raw meat, but {name2} gives up and runs away.
{name} and {name2} get into a fight over raw meat, but {name} gives up and runs away.
{name} and {name2} agree to work together for the remainder of the games.
{name} severely injures {name2} but puts them out of their misery.
{name} severely injures {name2} and leaves them to die.
{name} helps {name2} grab their package and they retreat together.
{name} and {name2} glare at each other across the Cornucopia but neither makes a move.
{name} kills {name2} for their supplies.
{name} stabs {name2} in the back with a trident.
{name} shoots an arrow into {name2}'s head.
{name} snaps {name2}'s neck.
{name} kills {name2} as they try to run.
{name} tackles {name2} to the ground and beats them to death.
{name} drives a sword through {name2} before they can grab their package.
{name} buries an axe in {name2}'s back as they flee.
{name} and {name2} work together to drown {name3}.
{name} and {name2} track down and kill {name3}.
{name} and {name2} intercept {name3} and cut them down.
{name}, {name2}, and {name3} confront each other, but {name3} runs away as {name} kills {name4}.
{name}, {name2}, and {name3} start fighting, but {name2} runs away as {name} kills {name4}.
{name}, {name2}, {name3}, and {name4} team up to grab food, supplies, weapons, and memoirs.
{name} shoots an arrow at {name2}, but misses and kills {name3} instead.
